title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at RITES

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at RITES
jsonLd.description:
Join the RITES family as a Logistics Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About RITES:
RITES is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RITES!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
